//: The ttsc/Go lowering config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build emit (build.ts): src/main.ts needs BOTH registration and addOptions<T>() lowering. Stage selection is declare-by-depending, resolved HOST-SIDE (§100): there is no `plugins` array, so ttsc auto-discovery spawns the one owner host (transforms/cmd/ttsc-std) from this app's direct *.transformer devDeps (di.transformer + di.transformer.options), and the host self-selects the full transitive stage set from its own dependency scan — the di stage (tokenless resolve/resolveAsync + the trailing `.as<"scope">()`), di_options (addOptions<T>), and the primitive stages inline/nameof/signatureof/mergesynth reached through di.transformer's honest primitives.transformer dep. `add<T>(ctor)` / `addFactory<T>(fn)` / `addValue<I>(value)` are substituted from di.transformer's rhombus.inline bodies (the same host scan collects them) into their explicit-token forms (`this.add(nameof<T>(), ctor, signatureof(ctor))`, `this.addValue(nameof<I>(), value)`, etc.), then the primitive stages lower the token (+ dependency-signature array for add/addFactory); mergesynth is inert here (this app installs no augmentation). Extends the base tsconfig. The `types` augmentations are RETAINED: declaration-site matching anchors each authored form on its `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program too — both the inline matcher (which discriminates the `add`/`addFactory`/`addValue` overloads by type-param count + value-param NAMES `ctor`/`factory`/`value`) and the di stage anchor on it; the tokenless `add`/`as`/`resolve` sugar declarations live ONLY in di.transformer's augment. @types/bun keeps the Generic Host's process/node:* surface resolved. Lint stays on plain tsc via the base tsconfig.json.
